findings.evidence: self.chef = chef; chef controls the behavior of the method.
self.frequent_customer_discount = False uses a boolean for discount status.
firstName, lastName, address, phone_number, email appear together.
temp_discount_code and temp_order_note are only meaningful in some states.
Method is present but never called.
35-LOC body with four unrelated `println` blocks at lines 63–97.
Method has 7 parameters: pizza_type, size, crust_type, toppings, extra_cheese, discount_code.
self.take_order("Cheese") is called twice with the same argument.
self.chef.clean_kitchen() is a chain of one method call.
Multiple methods (update_contact_info, update_name, etc.) need to be changed to update contact info.
The method is changed for different reasons (promotion, discount, new arrivals).
apply_discount and apply_loyalty_points are parallel methods.
if-elif-else chain based on complaint type.
Method is intended to be overridden but is empty.
